Uses of Class
org.episteme.social.sociology.Person

Packages that use Person
Package
Description
org.episteme.social.law
Provides the org.episteme.social.law module.
org.episteme.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
org.episteme.social.sociology.survey
Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.sociology.survey package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.

    Subclasses with type arguments of type Person in org.episteme.social.sociology
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Group
    Represents a formal or informal social group of individuals.
    class 
    Society
    Represents a society, defined by its type, culture, institutions, and geographic location.
    Classes in org.episteme.social.sociology that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Person
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SocialNetwork
    Represents a social network graph where persons are nodes and relationships are edges.
